{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27467","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27467/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27467/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27467/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27467","id":2553637583,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86YNWrP","number":27467,"title":"BUG: f2py fails to compile module on windows using v2.1.1","user":{"login":"ljgdasfhk","id":25474376,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjI1NDc0Mzc2","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/25474376?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk","html_url":"https://github.com/ljgdasfhk","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/ljgdasfhk/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-27T19:53:55Z","updated_at":"2024-09-27T19:53:55Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

I'm trying to compile the example from the documentation. 

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
C FILE: FIB1.F
      SUBROUTINE FIB(A,N)
C
C     CALCULATE FIRST N FIBONACCI NUMBERS
C
      INTEGER N
      REAL*8 A(N)
      DO I=1,N
         IF (I.EQ.1) THEN
            A(I) = 0.0D0
         ELSEIF (I.EQ.2) THEN
            A(I) = 1.0D0
         ELSE 
            A(I) = A(I-1) + A(I-2)
         ENDIF
      ENDDO
      END
C END FILE FIB1.F
```


### Error message:

```shell
PS F:\Research\f2py> f2py -c .\fib1.f
Cannot use distutils backend with Python>=3.12, using meson backend instead.

```python
C FILE: FIB1.F
      SUBROUTINE FIB(A,N)
C
C     CALCULATE FIRST N FIBONACCI NUMBERS
C
      INTEGER N
      REAL*8 A(N)
      DO I=1,N
         IF (I.EQ.1) THEN
            A(I) = 0.0D0
         ELSEIF (I.EQ.2) THEN
            A(I) = 1.0D0
         ELSE 
            A(I) = A(I-1) + A(I-2)
         ENDIF
      ENDDO
      END
C END FILE FIB1.F
